.meta.comment: Emit per-flow TCP health metrics to Kafka for data warehouse ingestion. Designed for durable peer-to-peer socket monitoring (e.g. ISO 8583) where both endpoints use static ports. Trigger v4.0.0 uses session-expiration-backed batching; wire schema remains 3.3.0.
.meta.name: TCP Flow Health Monitor

Trigger.author: thomass@extrahop.com
